# Data Model Checklist: Normalize Property Input to Canonical Location ID

**Purpose**: Validate data model requirements completeness and alignment with the feature spec.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/004-uc04-feature-spec/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are all data items listed in the spec explicitly defined with fields and types? [Completeness, Spec §Data Involved]
- [x] CHK002 Are fields defined for input type differentiation (address vs coordinates vs map click)? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK003 Are fields defined for spatial unit resolution priority and overlap handling? [Completeness, Spec §Clarifications] Note: Necessary; /prompts:speckit.plan rerun.
- [x] CHK004 Are fields defined for grid-cell fallback assignment when no parcel is found? [Completeness, Spec §Alternate Flows]
- [x] CHK005 Are fields defined for canonical ID conflict detection and resolution outcomes? [Completeness, Spec §Alternate Flows] Note: Necessary; /prompts:speckit.plan rerun.
- [x] CHK006 Are fields defined to represent downstream forwarding state? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements] Note: Necessary; /prompts:speckit.plan rerun.

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK007 Is the canonical ID structure (type prefix by resolved unit) defined clearly enough to model and validate? [Clarity, Spec §Clarifications]
- [x] CHK008 Is determinism/stability across repeated normalization represented in the data model? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Non-Functional Requirements] Note: Necessary; /prompts:speckit.plan rerun.

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK009 Do acceptance scenarios and functional requirements agree on stability and equivalence across inputs? [Consistency, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK010 Are data representations defined for geocoding failure and boundary failure outcomes? [Coverage, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
